LanguageData.VBE_AmbrandyAsIngredient.description: This colonist drank an atomic cocktail that had pungashine as one of its ingredients.
LanguageData.VBE_AmbrandyAsIngredient.label: drank pungashine-based atomic cocktail
LanguageData.VBE_AmbrandyInspiration.label: pungashine inspiration
LanguageData.VBE_ConsumedCocktail.description: Consumed a nice atomic cocktail. Has a chance to provide a random inspiration.
LanguageData.VBE_ConsumedCocktail.label: consumed atomic cocktail
LanguageData.VBE_DrankSoda.description: A burst of sugar from a bottle of homebrew sarsaparilla provides a short-lived lift. Provides a 5% manipulation buff for 5 hours.
LanguageData.VBE_DrankSoda.label: drank homebrew sarsaparilla
LanguageData.VBE_EnergyDrinkCrash.description: An unpleasant delayed after-effect of guarana consumption.
LanguageData.VBE_EnergyDrinkCrash.label: guarana crash
LanguageData.VBE_EnergyDrinkHigh.description: Guarana restores rest immediately and increases movement speed, but it always leaves a crash behind it.
LanguageData.VBE_EnergyDrinkHigh.label: guarana high
LanguageData.VBE_GinAsIngredient.label: drank gin-based atomic cocktail
LanguageData.VBE_RBMeadAsIngredient.label: drank mead-based atomic cocktail
LanguageData.VBE_TequilaAsIngredient.label: drank tequila-based atomic cocktail
LanguageData.VBE_VodkaAsIngredient.label: drank vodka-based atomic cocktail
LanguageData.VBE_WhiskeyAsIngredient.label: drank whiskey-based atomic cocktail
LanguageData.VBE_WineAsIngredient.label: drank wine-based atomic cocktail
